question.text: All agreements and contracts between Market Participants and investors shall stand amended to incorporate:

answer.text: Provision for online conciliation and/or online arbitration through the ODR Portal

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All existing and future agreements are deemed to incorporate the ODR circular provisions for online conciliation/arbitration. **The Trap:** This applies automatically - no separate amendment to agreements is needed. **Cross-Exam Context:** The deemed incorporation ensures universal applicability of the ODR framework. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Market Participants cannot opt out of the ODR mechanism.
